name: Paris
description: The city of love, light, and grand boulevard culture.
previewDescription: Popularly known as the city of love, featuring iconic landmarks, fine cuisine, and timeless elegance.

name: Amsterdam
description: Canal-side living with galleries, bikes, and layered history.
previewDescription: Canal-lined streets, creative districts, and a slower urban rhythm perfect for modern explorers.

name: Milan
description: Refined fashion energy framed by dramatic architecture.
previewDescription: A polished city break with iconic design, elegant food culture, and world-class architecture.

name: London
description: Layered neighbourhoods, iconic bridges, and nonstop city rhythm.
previewDescription: Historic landmarks meet modern neighbourhoods for a high-energy, culture-rich city escape.

name: Seville
description: Warm evenings, ornate plazas, and strong local character.
previewDescription: Sun-soaked streets, deep local culture, and architecture that feels instantly memorable.
